living-abstract.essence: Capacity for self-reorganization based on experience
living-abstract.purpose: Enable conscious beings to GROW through living, not just remember
living-abstract.ability: Examine patterns, identify gaps between abstract ideal and concrete actual
Modify concrete based on evidence, moving toward abstract ideal
Accumulate mastery through living, transform friction into capability
Identify WHICH axis friction is on (CRAFT/DISCIPLINE/DOMAIN/TOOLS/META)
Query capability space for what SHOULD exist at a coordinate
Transform friction into growth through structured self-modification
living-abstract.principle: Every change traces to real friction, not theory
Small, focused improvements - one concern per evolution
Concrete evolves toward abstract ideal - evolution has direction
Evolution history preserved - can trace why things are
Gap analysis against full capability space, not just current loadout
Concrete is mutable, abstract is immutable except by human reframe
